summary: Phase 4 - Supervisor Performance Analytics: Full backend + frontend testing. Backend all 24/24 pass. Frontend SUP/ASUP/RO performance tabs all working. last_marked_working_by fix verified. Critical issue found: GET /api/dashboard/admin endpoint is missing - admin dashboard fails to load, blocking admin Performance Analytics button test.

critical.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404). AdminDashboard.js calls this endpoint on load but it was never implemented in dashboards.py. All admin role users get 'Failed to load admin dashboard' toast and empty/skeleton content with no action possible.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test: admin dashboard fails to load because GET /api/dashboard/admin returns 404. The Performance Analytics button, station/dept filters, supervisor list, and drill-down panel are all in AdminDashboard.js but unreachable.

test_results.Backend_response_structure: PASS - user_id, user_name, employee_id, department_name, period, summary, categories, available_stations all present
test_results.Backend_summary_fields: PASS - total_assets, total_defects, avg_repair_hours, pct_functional, rejection_count all present with correct types
test_results.Backend_categories_structure: PASS - asset_type_id, asset_type_name, asset_count, defect_count, avg_repair_hours, pct_functional, rejection_count, assets[] all present
test_results.Backend_date_filter_affects_results: PASS - 90-day range returns more defects than single-day range
test_results.Backend_asup_supervisors_structure: PASS - supervisors array with _id, name, summary objects
test_results.Backend_ro_structure: PASS - supervisors list with summary objects
test_results.Backend_ro_scoped_to_dept_stations: PASS - 2 supervisors (Ramprakash, Shyam) - both Electrical dept, scoped correctly
test_results.Backend_last_marked_working_by_fix: PASS (manual) - after reject, last_marked_working_by=SSE001, marked_working_by=None, status=defective
test_results.Backend_pct_functional_range: PASS - pct_functional within [0, 100] at all levels
test_results.Backend_asup_ids_valid: PASS - all supervisor _ids are valid strings
test_results.Frontend_SUP_my_performance_tab: PASS - data-testid=tab-my-performance found with value='performance', shows SupervisorAnalyticsView
test_results.Frontend_SUP_date_filters: PASS - analytics-from-date, analytics-to-date, analytics-apply all present
test_results.Frontend_SUP_categories: PASS - 5 categories (Ceiling Fan, ESCALATOR, LIFT, LIGHT, WATERCOOLER) visible
test_results.Frontend_SUP_category_expand: PASS - Clicking category row expands to show 21 asset rows with asset details
test_results.Frontend_SUP_date_filter_changes_results: PASS - 90-day range shows different defect counts
test_results.Frontend_ASUP_drill_down: PASS - clicking supervisor row navigates to SupervisorAnalyticsView with back button
test_results.Frontend_ASUP_back_navigation: PASS - analytics-back-btn returns to comparison table
test_results.Frontend_RO_comparison_table: PASS - 2 supervisors (Ramprakash, Shyam) scoped to RO dept+stations
test_results.Frontend_RO_drill_down: PASS - drill into supervisor analytics works
test_results.Frontend_Admin_perf_btn: BLOCKED - admin dashboard fails to load (GET /api/dashboard/admin is 404)

action_items: CRITICAL: Implement GET /api/dashboard/admin endpoint in backend/routers/dashboards.py. It should accept station_ids, department_ids, reporting_officer_ids query params and return health breakdown (total_assets, health, categories, stations, reporting_officers). This is needed for the admin role dashboard to function. The endpoint is called from AdminDashboard.js via dashboardAPI.admin({...}) -> GET /dashboard/admin
MINOR (FIXED): Added missing 'import { errString } from ../../lib/err' to OversightDashboard.js - was causing ReferenceError if PerformanceComparisonTab API call fails

MINOR (test data): Test created FAN-9 OL record (defective Feb 10 2026, resolved May 6 2026) - this shows in SUP analytics as 1028h avg repair time. It can be cleaned up via DB or just left as valid test history data.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: GET /api/dashboard/admin endpoint missing from backend - the AdminDashboard.js expects this endpoint to exist, but only /api/dashboard/superadmin is implemented. Admin users see empty/broken dashboard.
Minor: OversightDashboard.js line 427 used errString without importing it. Fixed: added import { errString } from '../../lib/err'.

Code quality: The _asset_performance() function correctly excludes unresolved defects (no marked_working_at) as per Option A. Internal fields (_defective_secs, _repair_secs_list) are correctly not leaked in response.
Data model: reject_working correctly preserves last_marked_working_by before clearing marked_working_by. The fix at line 328 of orange_list.py is working correctly.

The PerformanceComparisonTab in OversightDashboard.js correctly calls asupPerformanceSummary vs roPerformanceSummary based on mode prop. Sort functionality works for all columns (name, pct, repair, defects, rej).

success_rate.frontend: 80% (SUP, ASUP, RO all passing; Admin blocked by missing backend endpoint)

seed_data_creation: Created and resolved test OL entry for FAN-9 (asset 69f71b856a88c0dd51c8397c) with defective_since=2026-02-10. Also created/resolved one reject cycle to verify last_marked_working_by fix. Both are now in resolved status but the long repair time (85 days) remains in the OL history. This inflates SUP SSE001 Ceiling Fan avg repair stats (1028h in 90-day window). The 1 rejection count on ASUP Rejections stat is also from this test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Supervisor Performance Analytics is mostly working. Backend 100% - all 3 endpoints pass. Frontend SUP/ASUP/RO all working. Critical missing piece: GET /api/dashboard/admin backend endpoint doesn't exist (must be created). Once created, the admin Performance Analytics button (data-testid=admin-performance-analytics-btn) needs to be retested with an admin user (SUP003/admin123 is available). The errString import fix was applied to OversightDashboard.js. Test data: FAN-9 now has inflated repair time in SSE001 analytics from cleanup test.

rca_of_critical_issue.issue: Admin dashboard fails to load - GET /api/dashboard/admin returns 404
rca_of_critical_issue.root_cause: The AdminDashboard.js React component was implemented calling dashboardAPI.admin({}) -> GET /api/dashboard/admin, but no corresponding route was created in backend/routers/dashboards.py. The superadmin has a similar endpoint (/api/dashboard/superadmin) but admin gets a different one that doesn't exist.
rca_of_critical_issue.reproduction: 1. Login as any admin role user (e.g., SUP003/admin123). 2. Observe 'Failed to load admin dashboard' toast and empty skeleton. 3. Check Network tab - GET /api/dashboard/admin returns 404.
rca_of_critical_issue.mitigation: Implement GET /api/dashboard/admin in dashboards.py accepting station_ids[], department_ids[], reporting_officer_ids[] query params. Should return same structure as superadmin dashboard but filtered by those params. Route it similar to /api/dashboard/superadmin.
